title: Savory French Cheese Souffle
description: A rich and creamy souffle filled with the flavors of France, perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Butter a 1-quart soufflé dish and coat with grated cheese.
Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add flour and whisk to combine. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
Slowly add heavy cream, whisking constantly.
Bring to a simmer and cook until thickened.
Remove from heat and stir in grated cheese until melted.
In a separate bowl, whisk egg whites until stiff peaks form.
In a separate bowl, whisk egg yolks and season with salt and pepper.
Add egg yolks to cheese mixture and stir to combine.
Gently fold egg whites into cheese mixture.
Pour into prepared soufflé dish and smooth top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until puffed and golden brown.
